register.successDescription: We've sent a confirmation link to {{email}}.

forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully changed.

errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
errors.checkEmailVerification: Check your email for the verification link.
errors.emailExists: An account with the specified email address already exists.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

logout.error: An error occurred during logout. Please try again.
